items.title: UAE condemns Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as US launches fresh strikes
items.summary: The third consecutive night of US strikes on Iran came as Trump announced a 20% charge as part of a new blockade on the strait.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Middle East crisis live: US launches new wave of strikes; UAE says two tankers in strait of Hormuz hit by Iranian missiles
items.summary: US military says latest strikes will ‘continue imposing a heavy cost on Iranian forces and degrade their ability to attack innocent civilians and commercial shipping’ in strait...
